The Target was Rolled from Material Enriched to 99.3%
Of Pb-208,Into a Self-Supporting Foil of 6.5 Mg/Cm**2
.The Scattered Protons were Detected at the Focal
Plane of the Broad-Range Spectrograph in Ilford
5.2*25.3 Cm Nuclear Track Plates,Which had 50 Mum
Thick G5 Emulsions and Extra Plasticiser.A 18 Cm Thick
Aluminium Absorber was Placed in Front of the Emulsions
The Absolute Magnitudes of the Inelastic Cross
Sections are Uncertain by About 10% But the Relative
Magnitudes of Overall Inelastic Cross Sections  are
Reliable to Within 5% or Less,Except For the Weakest
The Overall Resolution in the Experiment Ranged
